DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF CSV HOSPITALITY MANAGEMENT LLC'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSE TO INSPECTION DEMAND IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT PRO-AM INSURANCE AGENCY, INC. IS ORDERED TO PROVIDE FULL AND COMPLETE, VERIFIED FURTHER RESPONSES ACCOMPANIED BY THE PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS AS DEFINED BY EVID. CODE SECTION 250, AND IN FULL COMPLIANCE WITH CCP SECTION 2031.210(A) AND SECTION 2031.240. OBJECTIONS, IF ANY ARE TO BE IN FULL COMPLIANCE WITH CCP SECTION 2031.310. IF DEFENDANT PRO-AM INSURANCE AGENCY, INC. MAKES OBJECTIONS BASED UPON ATTORNEY-CLIENT COMMUNICATIONS OR ATTORNEY WORK PRODUCT, IT MUST PROVIDE DEFENDANT WITH A PRIVILEGE LOG. COMPLIANCE BY DEFENDANT PRO-AM INSURANCE AGENCY, INC. MUST OCCUR WITHIN 15 DAYS OF SERVICE OF THE NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER ON THIS MOTION. DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS DENIED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE PRO TEM: PETER J. VAN ZANDT; CLERK: JOHNNY SENGMANY; NOT REPORTED.=302/JPT.

DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF CSV HOSPITALITY MANAGEMENT LLC'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSE TO FORM INTERROGATORY 15.1 AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSE 2-6, 8-9, AND 11-12 IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF CSV HOSPITALITY MANAGEMENT LLC'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSE TO FORM INTERROGATORY 50.2-6 OD GRANTED. DEFENDANT PRO-AM INSURANCE AGENCY, INC. IS ORDERED TO PROVIDE FULL AND COMPLETE, VERIFIED FURTHER RESPONSES, WITHOUT OBJECTION, GENERAL OR OTHERWISE AND IN FULL COMPLIANCE WITH CCP 2030.210 - 2030.250 WITHIN 15 DAYS OF SERVICE OF THE NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER ON THIS MOTION. PLAINTIFF CSV HOSPITALITY MANAGEMENT LLC'S REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS GRANTED IN THE AMOUNT OF $2,460.00 AND A CHECK IN THAT AMOUNT MADE PAYABLE TO ZACKS, FREEDMAN & PATTERSON, PC, IN TRUST FOR CSV HOSPITALITY MANAGEMENT LLC MUST ACCOMPANY THE FURTHER RESPONSES. MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSE TO REQUEST, DEMAND INSPECTION, PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS
Off Calendar Feb-14-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCE: ATTY JAMES KRAUSE OF ZACKS, FREEDMAN & PATTERSON, PC TEL NO. 415-956-8100 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY B. NATALIE VU OF BURNHAM AND BROWN, PC TEL NO. 510-444-6800 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.
ATTY GOPAL S. PATEL OF PRINDLE, GOETZ, BARNES & REINHOLTZ, LLP APPEARING VIA COURT CALL FOR DEFENDANT.

RULING- A R G U E D, Plaintiff CSV HOSPITALITY MANAGEMENT LLC's Motion to Compel Further Response to Inspection Demand is GRANTED. Defendant PRO-AM INSURANCE AGENCY, INC. is ORDERED to provide full and complete, verified further responses accompanied by the production of documents as defined by Evid. Code Section 250, and in full compliance with CCP Section 2031.210(a) and Section 2031.240. Objections, if any are to be in full compliance with CCP Section 2031.310. If Defendant PRO-AM INSURANCE AGENCY, INC. makes objections based upon attorney-client communications or attorney work product, it must provide Defendant with a privilege log. Compliance by Defendant PRO-AM INSURANCE AGENCY, INC. must occur within 15 days of service of the Notice of Entry of Order on this Motion. Defendant's request for sanctions is DENIED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge Pro tem: Peter J. Van Zandt; Clerk: Johnny Sengmany; Not Reported.=302/jpt.

RULING- A R G U E D, Plaintiff CSV HOSPITALITY MANAGEMENT LLC's Motion to Compel Further Response to Form Interrogatory 15.1 Affirmative Defense 2-6, 8-9, and 11-12 is GRANTED. Plaintiff CSV HOSPITALITY MANAGEMENT LLC's Motion to Compel Further Response to Form Interrogatory 50.2-6 od GRANTED. Defendant PRO-AM INSURANCE AGENCY, INC. is ORDERED to provide full and complete, verified further responses, without objection, general or otherwise and in full compliance with CCP 2030.210 - 2030.250 within 15 days of service of the Notice of Entry of Order on this Motion. Plaintiff CSV HOSPITALITY MANAGEMENT LLC's request for sanctions is GRANTED in the amount of $2,460.00 and a check in that amount made payable to Zacks, Freedman & Patterson, PC, in trust for CSV HOSPITALITY MANAGEMENT LLC must accompany the further responses. DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-07-2016 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: James Kraus of Zacks, Freedman & Patterson telephone number 415-956-8100 for Plaintiffs CSV Hospitality Management LLC, 445 O'Farrell Street LLC, Suresh Patel and Sailesh Devdhara.
Natalie Vu of Burnham Brown telephone number 510-444-6800 for Defendant Pro-Am Insurance Agency, Inc.
Gopal Patel of Prindle, Goetz, Barnes & Reinholtz, LLP telephone number 562-436-3946 appeared by telephone for Defendant Indie-Pro Insurance Agency, Inc.

The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, the Court confirmed its tentative ruling.
Plaintiffs CSV Hospitality Management LLC, 445 O'Farrell Street LLC, Suresh Patel and Sailesh Devdhara's demurrer to the first, second and fourth through thirteenth affirmative defenses in the answer filed by defendant Pro-Am Insurance Agency, Inc. is sustained without leave to amend as to first, seventh and thirteenth affirmative defenses and overruled as to all other affirmative defenses. The first, seventh and thirteenth affirmative defenses are not cognizable affirmative defenses. As plaintiffs acknowledge, the other affirmative defenses, while pled in a conclusory fashion, are alleged per the standards of practice for civil litigation in this region. Given the ease of propounding form interrogatory 15.1which achieves all that plaintiffs seek by this demurrer and much more, no useful purpose is served by the demurrer to the second, fourth through sixth, and eighth through twelfth affirmative defenses. Order signed in open Court.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)
